tools.name: analyze_data
tools.description: Analyze data using natural language

tools.name: analyze_image_gemini
tools.description: Analyze images using Gemini 2.5 Flash Image vision capabilities. State-of-the-art OCR, object detection, scene understanding, visual Q&A, document analysis, and chart/graph interpretation.

tools.name: analyze_video_gemini
tools.description: Analyze videos using Gemini 2.5 Flash with File Upload API. Supports local video files up to 2GB, YouTube URLs, and comprehensive video understanding including scene analysis, object detection, content summarization, and visual Q&A.

tools.name: ask_oracle
tools.description: Escalate only when normal reasoning is exhausted or when a user explicitly requests it. Ask Oracle summons DeepSeek V3.2 via OpenRouter for ultra-hard problems, intricate code debugging, or Oracle-level insight, returning a deeply reasoned answer plus optional reasoning traces.

tools.name: ast_grep
tools.description: Semantic code search using AST patterns - finds code structure, not just text

tools.name: browse_web
tools.description: Browser automation for INTERACTIVE web tasks requiring clicks, form filling, navigation, login, purchases, or complex user interactions. NOT for simple information retrieval, news, or data gathering - use Tavily or Perplexity search tools instead for faster results.

tools.name: completion_validation
tools.description: Monitor and control the autonomous completion validation system that prevents agents from declaring tasks complete without fulfilling their commitments

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Edit files using exact string replacement - must use Read tool first

tools.name: edit_image_gemini
tools.description: Edit existing images using Gemini 2.5 Flash Image. State-of-the-art targeted transformations, background blurring, stain removal, pose alteration, and colorization with natural language instructions.

tools.name: generate_image_gemini
tools.description: Generate images using Google's Gemini 2.5 Flash Image model (nano-banana). State-of-the-art image generation with character consistency, multi-image fusion, and enhanced world knowledge.

tools.name: generate_image_openai
tools.description: Generate high-quality images using OpenAI's new GPT-image-1 model (not DALL-E). Supports various styles including coloring book pages, artistic images, and professional graphics. Cost-optimized for medium quality by default.

tools.name: glob
tools.description: Fast file pattern matching with glob patterns

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search files with regex patterns and advanced filtering

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List all available project templates with descriptions.

tools.name: macos_control
tools.description: Control macOS applications and system functions using native automation. Can open apps, send keystrokes, click buttons, run AppleScript templates, and automate complex workflows with AppleScript skill integration.

tools.name: manage_task
tools.description: Manage tasks with simple operations

tools.name: multi_edit_file
tools.description: Edit files with multiple exact string replacements - must use Read tool first

tools.name: notebook_edit
tools.description: Edit Jupyter notebook cells - insert, delete, or modify cells by ID or index

tools.name: perplexity_search
tools.description: AI-powered search with intelligent, curated answers. Best for research, complex questions, analysis, and when you need synthesized information rather than raw search results.

tools.name: project_template
tools.description: Create a new project from predefined templates.

tools.name: quick_update
tools.description: Send brief progress updates to keep users informed during long operations

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read file contents

tools.name: run_command
tools.description: Execute shell commands and code

tools.name: schedule_task
tools.description: Schedule recurring or one-time FFT tasks. Agent provides structured timing parameters (schedule_type, hour, minute, etc.) calculated from natural language. Supports one-time execution, daily, weekly, and interval schedules.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Search code using natural language

tools.name: semantic_search
tools.description:
Semantic CODE search using natural language and local embeddings (osgrep).
BEST FOR: Codebase concept search in git repositories - 'where is authentication handled?', 'find rate limiting logic', 'how do we validate tools?'.
NOT FOR: Project discovery in ff-terminal-workspace (use glob/grep instead - workspace is not a git repo).
Finds meaning in CODE, not just keywords. Powered by tree-sitter code parsing.

tools.name: session_summary
tools.description: Create or update long-term memory for cross-session continuity. Use at the end of work sessions to leave context for future sessions. Writes to ff-terminal-workspace/MEMORY.md and appends to ff-terminal-workspace/memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md.

tools.name: reset_session
tools.description: Reset or archive a session while keeping workspace memory intact.

tools.name: manage_memory
tools.description: Extract, update, or search long-term memory stored in MEMORY.md.

tools.name: sessions_list
tools.description: List available sessions from the workspace session store.

tools.name: sessions_history
tools.description: Fetch conversation history for a specific session.

tools.name: sessions_send
tools.description: Send a message into another session and return its response.

tools.name: sessions_spawn
tools.description: Spawn a sub-agent run in a new session and return its response.

tools.name: skill_apply
tools.description: Write a drafted skill to disk and refresh the registry.

tools.name: skill_documentation
tools.description: Generate documentation for existing skills or skill drafts.

tools.name: skill_draft
tools.description: Draft a skill manifest and instructions before writing files.

tools.name: skill_import
tools.description: Import a skill from URL, Git repository, or local file.

tools.name: skill_loader
tools.description: Load a skill's instructions and optional assets when a task needs them.

tools.name: skill_sequencer
tools.description: Execute multi-skill workflows with intelligent sequencing and compatibility checking.

tools.name: subagent_tool
tools.description: Launch specialized AI subagents for parallel execution and task acceleration. Create multiple subagents simultaneously to handle different aspects of complex projects. Each subagent works autonomously with full tool access - perfect for breaking down large tasks into parallel workstreams for maximum efficiency.

tools.name: tavily_crawl
tools.description: Crawl a website from a base URL (depth and page limit configurable)

tools.name: tavily_extract
tools.description: Extract web page content for specified URLs (supports text and images)

tools.name: tavily_map
tools.description: Map a site's internal link structure from a base URL

tools.name: tavily_search
tools.description: Fast web search with curated, relevant results. Best for news, facts, current events, and general information retrieval. Much faster than browser automation.

tools.name: think
tools.description: Optional scratchpad for complex or ambiguous tasks. Keep entries brief; do not show to the user.

tools.name: reasoning_protocol
tools.description: Load the on-demand reasoning checklist. Use when a task is ambiguous, risky, or multi-step.

tools.name: TodoWrite
tools.description:
Use this tool to create and manage a structured task list for your current coding session. This helps you track progress, organize complex tasks, and demonstrate thoroughness to the user.

IMPORTANT: Todos are a progress-tracking aid, not independent directives. Never invent placeholder todos (e.g., 'First task') or start executing work solely because old todos exist; only reflect the user’s actual request.

IMPORTANT: Work with 4-5 todos at a time for optimal focus and productivity. When todos are completed, remove them and add new ones as needed. Keep the active list manageable and prioritized.

tools.name: workflow_automation
tools.description: Record, save, replay and manage automated workflows. Supports both user-driven workflow creation and AI-powered pattern recognition. Can execute saved workflows with dynamic parameters. Supports macOS control (maintains login sessions) and browser automation modes.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write content to files
